ops.title: Guard-pack follow-ups from the fail-open review (pre-existing, deferred)
ops.description:
Adversarial review of the 2026-07-23 fail-open pack rewrite (plugin/capt-hook/hooks) surfaced four pre-existing defects deliberately deferred (quarantined emitter prior art / adversarial spellings):
1. Matcher last-flag-wins: `grep -E -G 'a+' .` rewrites with --regex though native grep's final -G makes the pattern literal (grep_guards matcher parse records booleans, not the final flag).
2. Context-flag ordering: `grep -A 1 -C 3 needle .` — grep honors the last flag; the emitted ccx command rebuilds -C before -A, changing context output.
3. `cat ././go.mod` bypasses the ManifestCat root-manifest steer (only one ./ prefix stripped; normpath would fix).
4. `ls ~/Code//` bypasses LsWorkspaceRoot (doubled trailing slash escapes the exact match).
None is doctrine-relevant; all are fidelity/spelling nits.

ops.text: Each of the four items is either fixed with an inline tests={} row pinning it, or explicitly wontfixed in a cc-notes note
uvx --isolated capt-hook pack test plugin green after any fixes
